automatic-translation-desc: Waxay bixisaa [[Special:AutomaticTranslation|tarjumaad otomaatig ah]] oo loogu talagalay bogagga nuxurka.
mint-home-info-panel-text: Malaayiin mawduuc oo ku jira Wikipedia ayaa si otomaatig ah loogu tarjumi karaa $1.
ax-home-random-topic-error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la soo qaadanayay mawduuc aan kala sooc lahayn.
ax-home-error-title: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la soo qaadanayay maqaalka $1.
mint-home-experimental-note: Taageerada tarjumaadda otomaatiga ah waa tijaabo. [$1 Baro wax badan]
mint-search-topic-page-results-container: Raadi mawduuc kasta. Waxyaabaha ku jira mawduuc waxay ku kala duwanaan karaan luqad kasta.
ax-translation-view-feedback-privacy-sta: Macluumaad dheeraad ah, eeg bayaanka sirta ee  [https://foundation.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Policy:Privacy_policy sahankan].
